targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "cpu_load_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "memory_used_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "uptime_sec" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "conn_total" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "cpu_load_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "memory_used_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "connected" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r.operator}))

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "signal_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "rsrp" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "RSRP")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "rssi" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "RSSI")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "sinr" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "SINR")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "rx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "LTE RX")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "tx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "LTE TX")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wireguard" and r._field == "rx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "WG RX")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wireguard" and r._field == "tx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "WG TX")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hotspot_summary" and r._field == "active_devices" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hotspot_summary" and r._field == "active_devices" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max)

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hotspot_host" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["router", "mac", "hostname"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["router", "hostname", "mac", "rx_bytes", "tx_bytes"])
